name: Peraso Inc.
summary: Peraso Inc. is a fabless semiconductor company focused on millimeter wavelength (mmWave) wireless technology, developing semiconductor devices and antenna modules operating in the 24–71 GHz spectrum. Products enable multi-gigabit point-to-point and point-to-multipoint wireless links, fixed wireless access (FWA), military communications, and consumer VR applications. The company also performs NRE services and licenses IP, and previously sold memory ICs for cloud networking and data center markets, which were end-of-lifed in 2023.

products.name: mmWave Semiconductor Devices
products.description: Chips operating in 24–71 GHz spectrum enabling multi-gigabit wireless links for FWA, military, and consumer applications.

products.name: mmWave Antenna Modules
products.description: Antenna modules based on proprietary mmWave semiconductor devices for wireless communications.

products.name: Memory ICs (Bandwidth Engine)
products.description: Memory-denominated integrated circuits for cloud networking, data center, and computing markets; end-of-lifed in 2023.

products.name: NRE Services
products.description: Non-recurring engineering services provided to customers.

products.name: IP Licensing
products.description: Licensing of intellectual property related to mmWave and semiconductor technologies.

partnerships.description: OEM serving the FWA worldwide market with equipment historically using mmWave spectrum.
